content.en:
The Shattered Star Lord was surrounded by several half-step Legendary Realm Lords and was breaking through at the moment.

Obviously, this is the Shattered Star Lord's body, otherwise it wouldn't have been so protected.

Even if it wasn't the main body, Ye Tian didn't care, what he wanted was the Shattered Star Lord's eternal treasure.

Buzz Buzz!!

One by one of the Half-Step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land hunted down the Shattered Star Lords and several half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

Along the way, the Void shatters.

Soon, a half-step Legendary Realm Lord of the Star Tower sacrificed himself to open a passage for the Shattered Star Lords and them, allowing them to successfully escape from the Isle of the Infinite Star Limits.

However, this half-step Legendary Realm Lord should be a clone, and if it was the main body, he would definitely not sacrifice himself stupidly.

"Chase!"

Many half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land chased and killed, and Ye Tian also followed the pursuit.

However, there are still some half-step Legendary Realm Lords who are not chasing and killing, but are breaking through the treasure troves of the Mysterious Star Tower.

......

"What should I do, no one came to save me, and the Ancestor was also surrounded by many Legendary Realm Lords. "

The Shattered Star Lord panicked.

Knowing that the Tricky Star Tower would be invaded, his body wouldn't stay in the Tricky Star Tower.

But now, it's time to regret it.

Although he was almost invincible in the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord realm, he was not the opponent of a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, even if he went all out, he could only support an ordinary half-step Legendary Realm Lord for a while.

"Seniors, give me a second to escape, and I'll use a secret treasure to escape. "

The Shattered Star Lord pleaded.

"Good!"

Several half-step Legendary Realm Lords nodded helplessly, although some of them were the main body, but a second delay was nothing, they still had hope of survival, if the Shattered Star Lord fell, and the Tricky Star Lord was still alive, they would not only be hunted down by the True Unholy Land, but even hunted down by the Tricky Star Lord.

Therefore, it is not a matter to protect the Shattered Star Lord and buy him a second.

Immediately.

These half-step Legendary Realm Lords all burst out of their strength one by one, and took the initiative to fight against the half-step Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land, making it impossible for people to disturb the Shattered Star Lord.

At this moment, the Shattered Star Lord took out a spell, which was a spell that could induce the sand and gravel of the empty sea.

When this spell burned, the sand of the empty sea that fused at the tip of the Eternal Supreme Sword erupted into spatial fluctuations.

In an instant.

The body of the Shattered Star Lord was carried into the air by the power of the sand and gravel of the air sea, and after a short stay in the air sea, he fled across the long distance in an instant.

In such a situation, the half-step Legendary Realm Lord couldn't catch up.

The reason why he only used this trick now was because at the headquarters of the Strange Star Tower, there were too many half-step Legendary Realm Lords in the True Saintless Land, and they had even been sealed by the Void by the True Void Realm, and it was difficult for him to escape into the empty sea.

Unless you are a Legendary Realm Lord, you can easily escape into the empty sea.

He had to rush out of the immeasurable island of the treacherous star before he dared to perform this trick.

"Want to go 'fight'?

Ye Tian silently urged an eternal treasure in his body - Ruyi Void Tissot.

This Median Eternal Arcana can also travel long distances, and can be temporarily escaped into the empty sea.

Wow!

Ye Tian's body disappeared and chased after the Shattered Star Lord.

In a void beyond the Immeasurable Sea, the body of the Shattered Star Lord appeared.

"Finally escaped, except for a few half-step legendary realms, no one should be able to hunt me down. "

The Shattered Star Lord muttered.

But in the next moment, his expression changed.

The void behind him distorted, and a figure emerged.

He originally thought that the other party was a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, so his expression changed drastically.

But soon, he breathed a sigh of relief.

"It's just that the Transcendental Realm Lord, it seems that he is a Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord who has a long-distance crossing journey, and after killing him, he will leave. "

The Shattered Star Lord stabbed out with a sword.

This is an eternal treasure containing the Kukai Gravel, and a single sword is enough to shatter the legendary body of the Transcendental Legendary Lord.

In the void area, the space is shattered, and a sword arrives.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian smiled, and with a wave of his hand, the Shattered Star Lord's body froze, and even the Eternal Treasure containing the sand of the empty sea could not take a step forward.

"Take control of time!"

The Shattered Star Lord's expression changed drastically.

"No!"

He didn't scream, and his body shattered directly under the power of time, leaving behind the eternal treasure.

This eternal treasure has become an ownerless thing, and layers of time and space are superimposed, as if it is about to enter a special state that cannot be reached.

But Ye Tian grabbed this eternal treasure with a light grasp.

It is very easy for him to grasp the Eternal Arcana at the level of a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, as long as he has enough control over time and space, not to mention that he has completely controlled time, and it is naturally extremely easy to take away the Eternal Arcana.

"It's time to go, I want to take out the Kukai gravel, I'm afraid I need the help of the Lord of the Legendary Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Instantly, he stepped away and disappeared.

Time lapses –

One of the bases of the Tricky Star Tower was destroyed, and even the Tricky Star Infinite Island was beaten to ruins.

And all over the Infinite Sea, the legendary lords of the Strange Star Tower are being hunted down.

And the multiple forces of the Lord of the Ten Thousand Seas were also at war with the True Saintless Land, but soon this struggle soon stopped with the destruction of the Strange Star Tower.

After all, it doesn't make much sense to continue fighting, and the legendary lords of the True Void Holy Land are also retreating and returning to the True Void Sacred Land.

The immeasurable sea corresponds to the long river of time.

Lord of the Stars is still on the run, but his body is already seriously injured.

At this time, one of his clones had already fought desperately in order to rescue the main body, and he was killed in battle, but it also severely damaged the clones of the two half-step Legendary Realm lords.

But this was still useless, even if some Legendary Realm Lords of the Ten Thousand Seas Alliance came to help, they still couldn't get out of the situation.

True Saintless Land has carefully prepared for this operation, and he is afraid that it will be difficult for him to escape. (yes)

Bang!

A number of Legendary Realm Lords came from the air and directly sent him into the depths of the River of Time.

Then, he was about to be beaten into the empty sea by the lords of the Legendary Realm of the True Infinite Holy Land from the long river of time, and the body of the Legendary Realm was annihilated again.

Suddenly.

A piece of news came that the Lord of the Stars had died in battle and his body had been killed.

At this point, he was the only Legendary Realm Lord left in the Strange Star Tower.

"'Lord of the Dragons, do you really have to kill me?'

The Star Lord roared.

"You once killed the Legendary Realm Lord of our True Saintless Land, do you think we will let you go?"

Lord Longgu said coldly.

"Hahahaha. "

The Star Lord laughed in despair.

Abrupt.

A fishhook emerges from the void and catches the Star Lord.

In the next moment, the body of the Star Lord was fished away, and the speed was too fast, and the Dragon Gu Lord and they didn't react. _
